bead.title: SD-024: Config-Driven Runtime Options
bead.description:
Epic tracking SD-024 / TD-024 implementation: replace the *Options-struct-with-durable-fields pattern across 5 families (ExecuteBeadLoopOptions, RunOptions, ExecuteBeadOptions, CompareOptions, QuorumOptions) with type-system-enforced ResolvedConfig + *Runtime split.

Stages:
- Stage 1: Foundation + ExecuteBeadLoop migration (unblocks FEAT-022 G)
- Stage 2: RunOptions migration
- Stage 3: ExecuteBeadOptions migration
- Stage 4: Lint enforcement + test debt cleanup

See docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-024-config-driven-runtime-options.md
and docs/helix/02-design/technical-designs/TD-024-config-driven-runtime-options.md
for the design rationale and 35-bead inventory.
bead.acceptance: All 35 child stage beads closed. runtimelint analyzer integrated into Lefthook + CI and passes on the post-cleanup tree. ExecuteBeadLoopOptions, RunOptions, ExecuteBeadOptions, CompareOptions, QuorumOptions no longer exist as types in cli/internal/agent/. ResolvedConfig usable via config.LoadAndResolve from all three dispatch sites (CLI, server worker, GraphQL StartWorker).
